parameters.query:
SELECT EXISTS(
  SELECT 1
  FROM public.message_events me
  WHERE me.channel = 'INSTAGRAM'
    AND me.provider = 'META'
    AND me.provider_message_id = {{ JSON.stringify($node["Parse Instagram Event"].json.provider_message_id) }}
  LIMIT 1
) AS is_duplicate

SELECT *
FROM public.resolve_conversation_entities(
  'INSTAGRAM',
  'META',
  {{ JSON.stringify($node["Parse Instagram Event"].json.external_user_id) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($node["Parse Instagram Event"].json.channel_account_id) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($node["Parse Instagram Event"].json.external_display_name || 'Instagram Lead') }},
  NULL,
  NULL
)

WITH contact_update AS (
  UPDATE public.contacts c
     SET lifecycle_status = 'IN_CONVERSATION',
         source = COALESCE(c.source, 'INBOUND_IG'),
         conversation_stage = COALESCE(c.conversation_stage, 'INTRO'),
         last_inbound_at = NOW(),
         last_touch_at = NOW(),
         bot_enabled = true,
         next_followup_at = NULL,
         updated_at = NOW()
   WHERE c.id = {{ JSON.stringify($json.contact_id) }}::uuid
   RETURNING c.id, c.ai_engagement_score
), event_insert AS (
  SELECT public.append_message_event(
    {{ JSON.stringify($json.thread_id) }}::uuid,
    {{ JSON.stringify($json.contact_id) }}::uuid,
    'INSTAGRAM',
    'META',
    'INBOUND',
    'LEAD',
    'MESSAGE',
    {{ JSON.stringify($node["Parse Instagram Event"].json.message_type) }},
    {{ JSON.stringify($node["Parse Instagram Event"].json.provider_message_id) }},
    {{ $node["Parse Instagram Event"].json.provider_parent_message_id ? JSON.stringify($node["Parse Instagram Event"].json.provider_parent_message_id) : 'NULL' }},
    {{ JSON.stringify('ig:' + $node["Parse Instagram Event"].json.provider_message_id) }},
    {{ JSON.stringify($node["Parse Instagram Event"].json.text_body || '') }},
    {{ JSON.stringify($node["Parse Instagram Event"].json.normalized_text || '') }},
    {{ $node["Parse Instagram Event"].json.media_url ? JSON.stringify($node["Parse Instagram Event"].json.media_url) : 'NULL' }},
    NULL,
    NULL,
    NULL,
    'RECEIVED',
    'PROCESSED',
    NULL,
    NULL,
    {{ JSON.stringify(JSON.stringify($node["Parse Instagram Event"].json.raw_payload || {})) }}::jsonb,
    NULL,
    {{ JSON.stringify($node["Parse Instagram Event"].json.received_at) }}::timestamptz
  ) AS event_id
), lead_sync AS (
  SELECT public.sync_contact_to_outreach_lead({{ JSON.stringify($json.contact_id) }}::uuid, {{ JSON.stringify($json.contact_channel_identity_id) }}::uuid, 'IN_CONVERSATION', 'INSTAGRAM', NULL, NULL, true) AS lead_id
), inbound_log AS (
  SELECT public.sync_message_event_to_outreach_log((SELECT event_id FROM event_insert), (SELECT lead_id FROM lead_sync), 'INBOUND_MESSAGE') AS log_id
)
SELECT
  (SELECT event_id FROM event_insert) AS event_id,
  (SELECT lead_id FROM lead_sync) AS lead_id,
  (SELECT log_id FROM inbound_log) AS inbound_log_id,
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.contact_id) }}::uuid AS contact_id,
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.thread_id) }}::uuid AS thread_id,
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.contact_channel_identity_id) }}::uuid AS identity_id,
  COALESCE((SELECT ai_engagement_score FROM contact_update), 0) AS ai_engagement_score

SELECT
  t.human_handoff,
  coalesce(cci.is_opted_out, false) AS is_opted_out,
  (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM public.message_events me
    WHERE me.thread_id = t.id
      AND me.direction = 'OUTBOUND'
      AND me.actor = 'BOT'
      AND me.created_at > coalesce((SELECT max(me2.created_at) FROM public.message_events me2 WHERE me2.thread_id = t.id AND me2.direction = 'INBOUND'), to_timestamp(0))
  ) AS consecutive_bot_outbound,
  (
    SELECT max(me.created_at)
    FROM public.message_events me
    WHERE me.thread_id = t.id
      AND me.direction = 'INBOUND'
  ) AS last_inbound_at
FROM public.threads t
JOIN public.contact_channel_identities cci ON cci.id = {{ JSON.stringify($node["Append Inbound Event"].json.identity_id) }}::uuid
WHERE t.id = {{ JSON.stringify($node["Append Inbound Event"].json.thread_id) }}::uuid

SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN me.direction = 'INBOUND' THEN 'LEAD'
    WHEN me.actor = 'BOT' THEN 'BOT'
    WHEN me.actor = 'HUMAN' THEN 'HUMAN'
    ELSE me.direction
  END AS direction,
  COALESCE(me.normalized_text, me.text_body, me.provider_message_id, '[sin texto]') AS message_text,
  me.created_at
FROM public.message_events me
WHERE me.thread_id = {{ JSON.stringify($node["Append Inbound Event"].json.thread_id) }}::uuid
ORDER BY me.created_at DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT key, segment, stage, type, title, content, priority, topic
FROM nv_playbook
WHERE active = true
ORDER BY priority ASC

WITH contact_update AS (
  UPDATE public.contacts c
     SET ai_engagement_score = {{ $json.new_score }},
         conversation_stage = {{ JSON.stringify($json.new_stage) }},
         hot_lead = {{ $json.is_hot }},
         ai_state = COALESCE(c.ai_state, '{}'::jsonb) || jsonb_build_object('intent', {{ JSON.stringify($json.intent) }}, 'score', {{ $json.new_score }}, 'stage', {{ JSON.stringify($json.new_stage) }}, 'reasoning', {{ JSON.stringify($json.reasoning) }}),
         updated_at = NOW()
   WHERE c.id = {{ JSON.stringify($json.contact_id) }}::uuid
   RETURNING c.id
)
SELECT public.sync_contact_to_outreach_lead({{ JSON.stringify($json.contact_id) }}::uuid, {{ JSON.stringify($json.identity_id) }}::uuid, 'IN_CONVERSATION', 'INSTAGRAM', NULL, NULL, true) AS id

WITH event_insert AS (
  SELECT public.append_message_event(
    {{ JSON.stringify($node["Post-process AI"].json.thread_id) }}::uuid,
    {{ JSON.stringify($node["Post-process AI"].json.contact_id) }}::uuid,
    'INSTAGRAM',
    'META',
    'OUTBOUND',
    'BOT',
    'MESSAGE',
    'TEXT',
    {{ JSON.stringify($json.message_id || '') }},
    NULL,
    {{ JSON.stringify(($json.message_id ? 'ig-bot:' + $json.message_id : null)) }},
    {{ JSON.stringify($node["Post-process AI"].json.reply) }},
    {{ JSON.stringify($node["Post-process AI"].json.reply) }},
    NULL,
    NULL,
    NULL,
    NULL,
    'SENT',
    'PROCESSED',
    NULL,
    NULL,
    jsonb_build_object('intent', {{ JSON.stringify($node["Post-process AI"].json.intent) }}, 'score', {{ $node["Post-process AI"].json.new_score }}, 'stage', {{ JSON.stringify($node["Post-process AI"].json.new_stage) }}),
    NOW(),
    NULL
  ) AS event_id
)
SELECT public.sync_message_event_to_outreach_log((SELECT event_id FROM event_insert), {{ $node["Post-process AI"].json.lead_id }}, 'BOT_REPLY') AS id

INSERT INTO public.compliance_events (
  thread_id,
  contact_id,
  channel,
  provider,
  compliance_type,
  reason,
  payload,
  created_at
)
VALUES (
  {{ JSON.stringify($node["Append Inbound Event"].json.thread_id) }}::uuid,
  {{ JSON.stringify($node["Append Inbound Event"].json.contact_id) }}::uuid,
  'INSTAGRAM',
  'META',
  CASE {{ JSON.stringify($json.blocked_by) }}
    WHEN 'opt_out' THEN 'OPT_OUT'
    WHEN 'outside_24h_window' THEN 'WINDOW_BLOCK'
    WHEN 'too_many_bot_outbound' THEN 'RATE_LIMIT_BLOCK'
    ELSE 'MANUAL_REVIEW'
  END,
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.blocked_by || 'blocked') }},
  jsonb_build_object('workflow', 'ig-inbound', 'blocked_by', {{ JSON.stringify($json.blocked_by || 'blocked') }}),
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id
